title: Commit remaining Tower operational artifacts and push
objective: Stage the remaining untracked Control Tower operational artifacts, create a follow-up local commit, and push the current branch to origin.
instructions: Review the current untracked files and stage the remaining Control Tower operational artifacts that were intentionally excluded from the prior durable-baseline commit.
Create a follow-up local commit that captures those remaining artifacts.
Push the current branch to origin after the local commit succeeds.
Report both the new commit hash and the final pushed branch state, including any residual untracked files if any remain.
constraints: Do not force-push or rewrite history.
Keep the scope to Git operations and existing working-tree artifacts.
expected_outputs: ResultPacket with new commit hash, pushed branch/ref, and any residual risks or leftovers.
definition_of_done: All current Control Tower rollout artifacts requested by the user are committed.
The branch is pushed to origin.
Any remaining untracked or modified files are explicitly listed.
